put.summary: Send a message (supports text, media file, and voice messages)

isVoice.description: Set to true if sending a voice message

durationMs.description: Duration of voice message in milliseconds

post.summary: Add a text note with optional music track

get.summary: Get active notes of followed users and self

post.summary: Hide stories from a specific user

delete.summary: Unhide stories from a specific user

get.summary: Get list of users you hid stories from

Bearer.description:
JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. 

 Enter 'Bearer' [space] and then your token in the text input below.

Example: "Bearer 12345abc-def"
Bearer.name: Authorization
